product_description.title: Apple EarPods (USB-C)
product_description.downstream_description:
Unlike traditional, circular earbuds, the design of the EarPods is defined by the geometry of the ear. Which makes them more comfortable for more people than any other earbud-style headphones.
The speakers inside the EarPods have been engineered to maximize sound output, which means you get high-quality audio.
The EarPods (USB-C) also include a built-in remote that lets you adjust the volume, control the playback of music and video, and answer or end calls with a press of the remote.

What’s in the Box
EarPods with USB-C Connector
System Requirements
• Mac models with USB-C running macOS Monterey 12.6 or later
• iPad models with USB-C running iPadOS 16.4 or later
• iPhone models with USB-C running iOS 17 or later
